items.title: Offline-first
items.desc: All features work with the WAN disconnected. No background sync, no "cloud login required" splash.

items.title: Low-power
items.desc: Whole system draws < 5 W idle. Logger lives on a Pi Zero 2 W; sensors run on coin cells for > 12 months.

items.title: Local-only data
items.desc: No data ever leaves the house network. Alerts use a local push gateway, not Apple/Google push.
